name: Holcomb Bus Svc Inc
registry_source: Iowa Secretary of State Business Entity Search (sos.iowa.gov)
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record for a Holcomb Bus Service at 450 Thelma St, Hudson, IA 50643. The only USDOT match for 'HOLCOMB BUS SERVICE INC' (USDOT 279612, MC-418250) is a large NJ interstate carrier headquartered at 170 Benigno Blvd, Bellmawr, NJ 08031 (375 power units, 350 drivers, Satisfactory rating 05/20/2022) — NOT the IA entity. Iowa Hudson location is likely a very small intrastate operator (no USDOT required for purely intrastate IA passenger ops under FMCSA thresholds). Iowa SoS entity search did not return a public hit via web search; recommend a direct on-site SoS lookup. Likely intrastate; address suggests a single-family-home-scale operation, possibly defunct.

name: Owner Bernhard Bus Svc
registry_source: CT Secretary of State CONCORD business search (business.ct.gov)
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found under 'BERNHARD BUS' (zero matches) or 'BERNHARD' broadly. The well-known Bernhard Bus Services LLC is owned by Bernie Weihs but operates from Quakertown, PA (Southeastern PA region), not Westport, CT. The Bernard Bus Service in Chatfield, MN is unrelated. The 'Owner Bernhard Bus Svc' listing at 111a Kings Hwy N, Westport, CT 06880 appears to be a list-scrape artifact (the literal word 'Owner' in the name suggests a directory record with an unknown legal name) and likely represents a defunct or one-person intrastate operator. No CT SOTS record located via public web search. Note Westport contracts school transportation to DATTCO/First Student.

name: Brown Transportation
fmcsa_address: 98 Intervale St, Dorchester, MA 02121 (per LinkedIn / corporate records)
registry_source: MA Secretary of the Commonwealth Corporations Division (corp.sec.state.ma.us)
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found under 'BROWN TRANSPORTATION' tied to Dorchester, MA. SAFER keyword matches for BROWN/BROWN TRANSPORTATION return carriers in FL (USDOT 1134442, 1257928), OK (Ardmore — Dale Brown Inc., browntransportation.com — aggregate/dump hauler, NOT school bus), AL, NY, ME, CA, MD, KS, IN (Brown Bus Transportation LLC, USDOT 537565, Evansville IN — passenger). LinkedIn lists a 'Brown Transportation' at 98 Intervale St, Dorchester, MA (51-200 employees, Transportation/Trucking/Railroad industry) — likely a small intrastate MA passenger/livery operator with no interstate FMCSA registration. Likely intrastate; recommend direct MA Corporations Division search and confirm phone number is local before outreach.

name: H & M Bus Co
officers: Melvin A. Myles (Owner / Principal); Lillie M. Myles (co-owner per property tax record at 1512 Brooke Rd)
entity_status: active (operating per BBB A+ rating; no dissolution found)
registry_source: Maryland State Department of Assessments and Taxation (egov.maryland.gov/BusinessExpress); BBB; Buzzfile
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate). H & M Bus Company is a small charter/local bus operator at 1512 Brooke Rd, Capitol Heights, MD 20743; phone (301) 736-0985. Owner Melvin A. Myles. Established 1969, incorporated in Maryland per Buzzfile. ~3 employees at HQ, ~$242K annual revenue. SAFER keyword search for 'H & M BUS' returned zero records, and 'H & M' only returned two unrelated LA carriers. Consistent with intrastate-only operation below FMCSA thresholds. BBB profile listed as 'not BBB accredited' but A+ rated. Recommend pulling SDAT entity for exact inc date and current entity status.

name: Vantour
registry_source: NY DOS Division of Corporations Public Inquiry (apps.dos.ny.gov/publicInquiry)
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate). SAFER keyword searches for 'VANTOUR' and 'VAN TOUR' returned zero records. Business is listed at 72 Decatur Ave, Spring Valley, NY 10977 on Yelp only — no website, no LinkedIn, no business directory entry with corporate detail. NY DOS public inquiry did not surface 'VANTOUR' exactly via web (similar Albany-registered LLCs VANTURE LLC and VINTAUR INC. exist but are at registered-agent address 418 Broadway, Albany, and are 2025 filings unrelated to Spring Valley). Address sits in heart of Rockland County school-transport contractor cluster (East Ramapo CSD area). Most likely a sole-proprietor or DBA intrastate van/school-bus operator; possibly the legal entity is filed under a related name (sister entity to Vantour 1 Inc rank 377 — see same fallback file). Recommend direct NY DOS lookup for 'VANTOUR 1 INC' (rank 377, 1 Schevchenko Pl, Spring Valley) — may share principals.
